Abeyton Lodge · Member Reference
← Return to Abeyton Lodge

Member
Quick Guide

How to book, order, manage your household, and message staff — from your phone.

Members Mobile Reservations Ordering Messaging
Sign In● Navigation● Book● My Trips● Order● Members● Messages
01
Signing In
Open the app in any mobile browser and sign in with your member account.
Login Screen
How to sign in
1
Visit the app
Open abbeyton-lodge.netlify.app in Safari or Chrome. Add it to your home screen for quick access.
2
Enter email & password
Type your member email and password, then tap SIGN IN. Tap SHOW to reveal the password as you type.
3
No account?
Tap Request access at the bottom of the login screen. Contact the club to have your account created.
02
Getting Around
The bottom navigation bar gives you access to all five member features.
✦BOOK
⊞MY TRIPS
◎ORDER
◉MEMBERS
◈MESSAGES
1
✦ Book
Make a new reservation. 3-step wizard: When & Where → Who's Coming → Confirm.
2
⊞ My Trips
View all your upcoming and past reservations.
3
◎ Order
Place food orders for each person in your party.
4
◉ Members
Manage your household: names, relations, and dietary restrictions.
5
◈ Messages
Send notes to staff about any reservation. Staff replies appear here.
03
Booking a Reservation
Three steps. You can go back at any point before confirming.
Step 1 — When & Where
Step 1 of 3
1
Choose a date
Tap the DATE field to open the date picker. Select your desired visit date.
2
Select Lunch or Dinner
Tap Lunch or Dinner. This determines which menu is available when ordering.
3
Pick a time
Tap the TIME field and select from the time picker. Example: 1:00 PM.
4
Room & Notes (optional)
Tap ROOM to request a preferred dining area (Pool, Breakfast Nook, Card Room, etc.). Add any special notes — e.g. "Somewhere shady" or "No chocolate". Staff will see these.
5
Tap Next: Who's Coming →
The big dark button at the bottom advances to Step 2.
Step 2 — Who's Coming
Step 2 of 3
1
Your household auto-populates
All saved household members appear automatically. Saved members show a MEMBER badge.
2
Remove anyone not attending
Tap the × next to any name to remove them from this reservation's party.
3
Add a guest
Type a name in the Guest name... field and tap Add. Guests show a GUEST badge. Max 10 per reservation — shown as (N/10).
4
Tap Review →
Advances to the confirmation screen. Tap ← Back to go back to Step 1.
Step 3 — Confirm
Step 3 of 3
1
Review the summary
Check Date, Time, Meal, Room, Party names, and Notes. Everything is shown in a clean summary table.
2
Tap Confirm Reservation ✓
Submits the reservation. It immediately appears on the staff's Admin page as Confirmed. You'll see it in My Trips.
3
Need to change something?
Tap ← Back to return to Step 2. Message staff after confirming if you need changes.
04
My Trips
All your reservations in one place — upcoming and past.
My Trips
Reading your reservations
1
Upcoming vs. Past
Tap Upcoming or Past at the top to toggle the list.
2
Read the reservation card
Each card shows: date, time, meal type (Lunch/Dinner), any notes you added (e.g. "No chocolate", "Hangin' with Nolan"), and status — CONFIRMED →.
3
Tap a card to see details
Tap CONFIRMED → to open the reservation. From there you can see attendees, check order status, and send messages.
⚠️
If a card shows ⚠ No order placed, nobody in your party has ordered yet. Go to the Order tab to place orders before arriving.
05
Ordering Food
Each person in your party gets their own individual order. Place orders before or after arriving.
Select a Reservation
Step 1 — Pick a reservation
1
Tap Order in the bottom nav
A list of your reservations appears. Green dots indicate upcoming reservations. Each shows date, time, and meal type.
2
Tap TAP TO ORDER →
Select the reservation you want to order for. You can have multiple reservations on the same day — make sure you pick the right one.
Placing an Order
Step 2 — Place orders per person
1
Select a person at the top
Name pills appear for each attendee (e.g. Nat, Molly, Parker, Jaime, Nolan). Tap a name to switch to that person's order. A number badge shows how many items they have.
2
Browse by category
Filter: All Starters Salads & Bowls Add-ons etc. Each item shows a description and price.
3
Add items
Tap Add on any item. It appears in the CURRENT ORDER box at the top. If already added, the button shows +1 and a badge shows "N in order". Tap − to remove.
4
Switch to the next person
Tap another name pill and repeat. Each person's order is saved as you go. Orders are submitted automatically — no separate "submit" step needed.
🔒
Once staff fires an order it cannot be changed. The screen will show "This order has been fired and can no longer be edited" and menu Add buttons will be grayed out. Message staff if you need a change after firing.
06
Household Members
Save your family once. They auto-populate every time you book a reservation.
Household Members
Viewing your household
1
Each card shows a person
Name, relation (Primary, Spouse, Child), and dietary restriction tags (e.g. VEGAN, SHELLFISH ALLERGY, DAIRY FREE, FISH ALLERGY).
2
Tap Edit to update a member
Change their name, relation, or dietary restrictions. Tap Save Changes to confirm. A "Member updated" toast confirms it saved.
3
Tap Remove to delete
Removes them from your household. They won't appear in future reservations. This cannot be undone — you'd need to add them again.
Add New Member
Adding a new household member
1
Tap + Add Household Member
The big dark button at the bottom of the Members list opens the New Member form.
2
Fill in their info
Full Name is required. Relation is optional (e.g. Child, Spouse). Tap any dietary restriction tags that apply — selected ones turn dark.
3
Tap Add Member
They're saved and will appear in the household list and auto-populate on future reservations.
ℹ️
Dietary restrictions you save here automatically appear on kitchen chits when staff prints them. Keep these accurate — it helps the kitchen prepare safe meals.
07
Messaging Staff
Send notes to the staff about a specific reservation. Each reservation has its own separate thread.
Select a Reservation
Step 1 — Pick a reservation to message about
1
Tap Messages in the bottom nav
A list of your reservations appears — past and upcoming — showing date, time, and meal type.
2
Tap TAP TO VIEW MESSAGES →
Opens the message thread for that specific reservation. Each reservation has its own separate conversation — make sure you pick the right one.
Message Thread
Step 2 — Sending & receiving messages
1
Read the thread
Messages appear in order. Your messages show your email on the left. Staff replies show their email. The date and reservation appear at the top.
2
Type your message
Tap the Message to staff... field at the bottom and type. Keep it specific — e.g. "We've ordered", "Can we move to a shaded spot?", "One person has a severe nut allergy not on file".
3
Tap Send
Your message appears immediately. Staff will see an unread indicator on their Admin page and can reply from the reservation detail.
💡
Staff replies appear in the same thread — just refresh the page if you're waiting for a response and don't see it yet.
